# TipMinder

> A convenient tip tracker for monitoring revenue and analytics.

## Overview
TipMinder is a web application designed for workers in the service industry to track, monitor, and analyze their tips and overall revenue. It provides clean visualization, history tracking, and analytics dashboards.

## Docs
- [Redux Toolkit](https://redux-toolkit.js.org/)
- [React Router](https://reactrouter.com/changelog/)
